data.description:

Brainhole Technology Limited ( (HK:2203) ) has provided an update.

Brainhole Technology Limited has announced a change in its auditors due to a disagreement over the proposed auditor’s remuneration with SHINEWING (HK) CPA Limited. The company has appointed Prism Hong Kong Limited as the new auditors, citing their competitive proposals and industry expertise. The Board believes this change will enhance cost-effectiveness and maintain audit quality, benefiting the company and its shareholders.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Kavango Resources ( (GB:KAV) ) has issued an announcement.

Kavango Resources PLC has announced its secondary listing on the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange (VFEX) in Zimbabwe, effective from September 8, 2025. This move includes a capital raising initiative through the issuance of new ordinary shares to various investors, including pension funds and local residents, as well as share awards to eligible employees in recognition of their service. The listing is part of Kavango’s strategic efforts to expand its market presence and enhance its financial capabilities, with further plans for a UK subscription and placing to follow.

More about Kavango Resources

Kavango Resources PLC is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is engaged in identifying and developing mineral deposits, with a particular emphasis on projects in Zimbabwe.

The latest update is out from FTAI Aviation ( (FTAI) ).

FTAI Aviation Ltd. announced the completion of the sale of 39 aircraft as part of its 2025 Aircraft Sale initiative, which was disclosed on December 30, 2024. This strategic move, involving a partnership with institutional investors, aims to enhance the company’s capital structure and market positioning by focusing on on-lease 737NG and A320ceo aircraft. The company serves as the Servicer of the 2025 Partnership, managing various operational aspects and maintaining a 20% limited partnership interest.

data.description:

Chijet Motor Company ( (CJET) ) has shared an announcement.

On September 4, 2025, Chijet Motor Company, Inc. successfully closed an $8.0 million public offering. The offering involved the sale of 13,560,000 Class A ordinary shares and accompanying warrants, with Maxim Group LLC acting as the sole placement agent. The proceeds from this offering are expected to enhance the company’s financial position, potentially impacting its market operations and stakeholder interests. Additionally, key company officers and major shareholders entered into lock-up agreements, restricting the sale of shares for 45 days post-offering, which may stabilize the company’s stock price in the short term.

The latest update is out from Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. ( (SG:QNS) ).

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. has announced the proposed issuance of 147,982,380 new ordinary shares as part of its acquisition of a 40% stake in MCRE Resources Sdn. Bhd. The latest announcement is out from GoviEx Uranium ( (TSE:GXU) ).

GoviEx Uranium Inc. has announced progress in its reverse takeover transaction with Tombador Iron Limited, which aims to create ‘Atomic Eagle Ltd’, an ASX-listed uranium developer. The transaction is expected to enhance the company’s balance sheet and streamline its corporate structure, with GoviEx shareholders holding a majority stake. The deal is anticipated to be transformative, unlocking significant value for stakeholders and advancing the Muntanga Project in Zambia.

Spark’s Take on TSE:GXU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:GXU is a Underperform.

GoviEx Uranium’s overall stock score reflects substantial financial and operational challenges. The significant financial instability due to continuous losses and reliance on external financing weigh heavily on the score. Technical analysis indicates a bearish trend, further impacting investor sentiment. Valuation metrics highlight the unprofitability of the company. However, the promising feasibility study for the Muntanga project offers potential upside if successfully executed, which slightly mitigates the overall negative outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:GXU stock, click here.

More about GoviEx Uranium

GoviEx Uranium Inc. is a mineral resource company focused on the exploration and development of uranium properties in Africa. The company’s principal objective is to become a significant uranium producer through the continued exploration and development of its mine-permitted Muntanga Project in Zambia.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust ( (SG:SET) ) has shared an update.

Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust has announced changes to its senior management team as part of its succession planning and leadership development initiatives. Shane Hagan has stepped down as Chief Financial Officer after more than seven years, and Ms. Tay Hui Chen will take over as Head of Finance, bringing 20 years of experience in finance and audit. Additionally, Ms. Elena Arabadjieva will assume the role of Chief Capital Markets and Investor Relations Officer, focusing on capital markets strategy and stakeholder engagement.

Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust operates in the real estate investment sector, focusing on managing and investing in property assets. It is a stapled group comprising a real estate investment trust and a business trust, both constituted under the laws of the Republic of Singapore.
